title: Assorted Wardens
description: The pack for all your Warden Variants!
body:
![spark_server](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

![Behold](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)

***

Assorted Wardens is the perfect pack for your Wardens, bringing many custom variants that will scare you to death!

![banner](https://i.imgur.com/3K7LVks.png)

![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)

***

This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)

![Features](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png93483284/1086427548889657395/Features.png)

***

These mob variants can all be renamed to their appropriate skins and spawn naturally. PNG Wardens and Cameo Wardens spawn very rarely under y=60, and the Minecraft Dungeons Wardens spawn only above y=60. The pack is formatted to make it easy to create addons!

![Warden Thumbnail](https://i.imgur.com/iqbLuTa.png)

![Notes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7a79e9eb639b944902b08f1e240840069723570.png)

***

This pack wouldn't be possible if it weren't for the following:

*   Butterd
*   Kemiu
*   ShinyDragon
*   ALtheGatorMC
*   Aurora
*   Bon Appetit Studios
*   Cloaker
*   MickeyJoeAlpha
*   BrownOwl

![](https://i.imgur.com/6mb4QDE.png)
